calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff GRANT & WEBER, a Corporation.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendants KENNETH ADAMS, aka KENNY ADAMS; SANDRA D. ADAMS, aka SANDRA D. RODDY-ADAMS.
Lisa Latta sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank and against Defendant Gawzia I. Indrawes as follows:
Principal $3,369.50
Pre-Judgment Interest $805.91
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $322.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,297.41
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
